reason: All acceptance criteria for TASK-387 are satisfied. Universal phase envelope, YAML-extended contracts, workflow-local artifact persistence, and runtime contract compilation are fully implemented. The PhaseDiagnostics/RepairPlan omission is explicitly documented as a known constraint.
